---
name: Feature request
about: Suggest a new hero, enemy, hazard, event, or mechanic
title: "[idea] "
labels: enhancement
assignees: ''
---

## What's the idea?
One-line summary.

## Why
What gap does this fill? What problem does it solve, or what makes the game more fun?

## How would it work?
- Mechanic / numbers / triggers
- How does the player unlock or interact with it?
- What does it look like in-game?

## Inspiration
Other games, films, or ideas this borrows from (optional).

## Tradeoffs
Anything you're worried about? Balance concerns? Scope?
